instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot sensor measuring input current",

]

    base:desc "Robot sensor measuring angular velocity",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Robot sensor measuring position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance RobotSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance RobotSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with physical system data, where friction model parameters are dynamically updated during runtime to compensate for control system dead time, ensuring continuous adaptation to changing operational conditions."

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated through an Asset Administration Shell (AAS) integrating SysML structural models and Simulink behavioral models via Functional Mock-up Interface (FMI), with data flow managed by ThingsBoard and MQTT protocols for real-time monitoring and visualization. The system includes a pipeline that processes live robot data, runs simulations, and updates the digital shadow with traceable data linking to computation methods."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through traceability and verification of transformations (e.g., from SysML to simulation models), with reliability dependent on model correctness. Dynamic adaptation of physics-based and data-driven friction models occurs via automatic parameter updates and neural network retraining as new data arrives, compensating for wear, temperature changes, or varying payloads. Anomaly detection in friction behavior enables predictive maintenance and early fault detection, reducing trajectory errors and enhancing system reliability. Fine-grained traceability of data traces to their generating components and models supports continuous quality assurance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT publish-subscribe architecture with hierarchical topics; ThingsBoard as IoT data storage platform; security implemented through topic-based read/write permissions; no specific bandwidth, latency, or redundancy details provided."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration via Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for Industry 4.0 interoperability, utilizing MQTT for IoT data communication and ThingsBoard for visualization, with SysML and Simulink models integrated through Functional Mock-up Interface (FMI) for multi-domain modeling. Data exchange adheres to standardized protocols ensuring seamless connectivity with external IoT devices and enterprise systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) standards including SysML [17] for system modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25], [26] as architecture description languages (ADLs) for component & connector perspectives, and adheres to reference model conformance relations [41] to ensure structured development and interoperability."
]
